2604.11417.title: Efficient Emotion-Aware Iconic Gesture Prediction for Robot Co-Speech
2604.11417.paper_summary: Co-speech gestures increase engagement and improve speech understanding. Most data-driven robot systems generate rhythmic beat-like motion, yet few integrate semantic emphasis. To address this, we propose a lightweight transformer that derives iconic gesture placement and intensity from text and emotion alone, requiring no audio input at inference time. The model outperforms GPT-4o in both semantic gesture placement classification and intensity regression on the BEAT2 dataset, while remaining computationally compact and suitable for real-time deployment on embodied agents.
2604.11417.paper_summary_zh: 共語手勢增加了參與感並改善了語音理解。大多數數據驅動的機器人系統生成類似節拍的有節奏運動，但很少有系統整合語義強調。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種輕量級Transformer，僅根據文本和情感推導出標誌性手勢的放置和強度，在推理時不需要音頻輸入。該模型在BEAT2數據集上在語義手勢放置分類和強度回歸方面均超越了GPT-4o，同時保持計算上的緊湊性，適合在具身代理上進行實時部署。
2604.11417.author: Edwin C. Montiel-Vazquez et.al.
2604.11417.authors: Edwin C. Montiel-Vazquez, Christian Arzate Cruz, Stefanos Gkikas, Thomas Kassiotis, Giorgos Giannakakis, Randy Gomez
